name: resolver-e1-persistence-round-trip
description: ADR 0037 Phase V Wave 2 invariant — `qualia.settings` user-overrides survive a page reload. Apply Standard, manually set bloomStrength to a sentinel value (1.7), reload, verify the field still reads 1.7 with provenance='user'. Locks the unified-persistence blob's round-trip discipline.

commands: (async () => { window.__canaryApplyProfile('standard'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); window.__canarySetPerfSettings({ bloomStrength: 1.7 }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200)); const blob = localStorage.getItem('qualia.settings'); if (!blob) throw new Error('precondition: qualia.settings localStorage key missing after setPerfSettings'); const parsed = JSON.parse(blob); if (!parsed.userOverrides || parsed.userOverrides.bloomStrength !== 1.7) throw new Error('precondition: qualia.settings.userOverrides.bloomStrength expected 1.7, got: ' + JSON.stringify(parsed.userOverrides)); return 'E1 setup ok: qualia.settings holds bloomStrength=1.7'; })()

actions.command: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); const perf = window.__canaryGetPerfSettings().value; if (perf.bloomStrength !== 1.7) throw new Error('post-reload: expected bloomStrength=1.7 (survived from pre-reload), got: ' + perf.bloomStrength); const touched = window.__canaryGetTouchedPerfFields().value; if (!touched.includes('bloomStrength')) throw new Error('post-reload: bloomStrength should be in touched set, got: ' + JSON.stringify(touched)); const prov = window.__qualiaGetSettingProvenance('bloomStrength').value; if (prov !== 'user') throw new Error('post-reload: provenance expected user, got: ' + prov); return 'E1 pass: bloomStrength=1.7 survived reload, prov=user'; })()
